use_cases: Serves as a full-page gradient background for landing pages
Provides decorative radial gradient overlay for hero sections
Adds subtle color depth to section backgrounds without distracting from content
Creates atmospheric visual interest using indigo and purple tones
ai_summary: A pure CSS radial gradient background component using indigo and purple tones. Features light mode and dark mode variants through CSS custom properties. Designed as a decorative full-bleed background element for pages and sections with no interactivity.
